chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Visiting the Prophet {saws} and the Imams {a.s}, Peace Be Upon Them All

text: 3186 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «ضَمِنْتُ لِمَنْ زَارَ قَبْرَ أَبِي بِطُوسَ عَارِفاً بِحَقِّهِ اَلْجَنَّةَ عَلَى اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3186 - Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Jawad (as) said:
"I guarantee Paradise with Allah (swt), the Mighty and Exalted, for whoever visits the grave of my father in Tus, recognizing his right."
